summary: Positive fan reaction to a stellar Help > Slip > Franklin's sequence; recording details not mentioned
review: The reviewer gushes about the Help on the Way → Slipknot! → Franklin's Tower performance, calling it unbeatable and labeling it a real gem, and also recommends catching the Stagger Lee rendition. No comments are made regarding the source or sound quality of the tape.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single review, but it is enthusiastic about key songs; lack of recording info limits confidence and keeps rating below top tier.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments on soundboard, audience mix, clarity or any technical aspects.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer highlights only the Help/Slip/Franklin segment and Stagger Lee, implying those moments stood out.
